items.title: ICE will be 'key part of security' at World Cup in US
items.summary: The acting head of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has told a congressional committee that the agency is "a key part of the overall security apparatus for the World Cup" when asked if he would pause operations for this summer's tournament.

items.title: Leuven v Arsenal: Women’s Champions League – live
items.summary: Minute-by-minute updates on the last-16 first leg WSL talking points: Arsenal punish City | Email Sarah I would love to hear from you. I was discussing with a friend the other day if a Jaffa Cake is a cake or a biscuit, I am firmly on the cake side and she was adamant it was a biscuit. Please get in touch so we can settle the argument, you can email me to let me know your thoughts. Catch up on our Women’s Football Weekly podcast while you wait for this match to get underway: Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Go Ahead Eagles geeft Deijl zijn afscheid
items.summary: NEC heeft woensdagavond de kans om de tweede plek in de Eredivisie te grijpen. De Nijmegenaren moeten daarvoor minstens gelijkspelen thuis tegen FC Utrecht (aftrap 21.00 uur). Eerder op de avond staan Go Ahead Eagles en SC Heerenveen tegenover elkaar en ook Liverpool komt in actie. Je volgt het in de VI Live.

items.title: Extra zout in de wonden: West Ham-selectie viert punt tegen Man Utd bij de kapper
items.summary: West Ham United speelde dinsdagavond gelijk tegen Manchester United en daar waren ze in Londen uiterst tevreden over. Ze brachten een zegereeks van de tegenstander van vier duels ten einde. Om extra zout in de wonden te strooien, lieten de spelers zich een fris kapsel aanmeten.

items.title: Madrid, UEFA reach deal, end Super League suits
items.summary: UEFA, European Club Football Association (EFC), and Real Madrid have reached a deal to end all legal disputes related to the Super League, UEFA and Real Madrid said on Wednesday.

items.title: Tottenham sack Frank after 8 months in charge
items.summary: Thomas Frank has been sacked as Tottenham head coach, the club confirmed Wednesday.

items.title: Wrexham boss welcomes Mac's 'job for life' claim
items.summary: Wrexham boss Phil Parkinson has welcomed co-owner Rob McElhenney's suggestion that he has the job for life, revelling in his role in the club's "fantastic story".

items.title: Sesko: Man United will fight for top-four finish
items.summary: Benjamin Sesko believes his rescue act at West Ham proves Manchester United have the stomach for the fight for a Champions League place.

items.title: Mullins ready to take on Constitution Hill at Southwell
items.summary: Willie Mullins could add intriguing spice to the meeting at Southwell on Friday week, as he gives serious consideration to fielding a runner against Constitution Hill.

items.title: Shevchenko plans to tell Infantino face-to-face that Russia’s football ban must stand
items.summary: Ukrainian FA president seeks meeting on Thursday Fifa president due at Uefa congress in Brussels Andriy Shevchenko will seek a meeting with Gianni Infantino on Thursday to discuss the Fifa president’s recent comments that favoured Russia’s return to international football competitions. Infantino sparked condemnation in Ukraine when, speaking in an interview last week, he said the ban on Russia’s participation should be reassessed. Shevchenko, the Ukrainian Association of Football president, is looking to restate Ukraine’s position in private when the pair attend Uefa’s congress in Brussels. Continue reading...

items.title: Shiogai maakt eerste treffer voor Wolfsburg
items.summary: Kento Shiogai heeft zijn eerste officieuze treffer in het shirt van VfL Wolfsburg te pakken. De van NEC overgekomen spits was in een oefenduel met SV Meppen goed voor de openingsgoal. Wolfsburg won het duel met 2-0.

items.title: Grand Slam of Darts expands to 48-player field for first time - live on Sky Sports
items.summary: This year's Grand Slam of Darts has expanded to a 48-player field for the first time at WV Active Aldersley in Wolverhampton - live on Sky Sports.

items.title: Aanzienlijk hogere pot: dit is dit jaar het prijzengeld in de KNVB-beker
items.summary: De KNVB heeft de prijzenpot in de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker dit seizoen aanzienlijk opgeschroefd. De winnaar gaat naar huis met een half miljoen euro, een stijging van ruim 42 procent. Dit valt er te verdienen in het bekertoernooi in het seizoen 2025/26.

items.title: Araújo doet boekje open over depressie: 'Laat zien hoe ziek de maatschappij is'
items.summary: Ronald Araújo heeft uitleg gegeven over zijn periode van afwezigheid bij Barcelona. De Uruguayaanse verdediger verdween na zijn rode kaart tegen Chelsea een tijdje, omdat hij worstelde met zijn mentale gesteldheid. Nu is hij terug.

items.title: Real Madrid and Uefa set to end Super League dispute
items.summary: Real Madrid and Uefa say they are set to end their legal dispute over the failed European Super League project.

items.title: Tottenham job proved too big for Frank, but changing manager won't fix mess at club
items.summary: Thomas Frank took over at Tottenham after they won the Europa League. Now he's been fired with the club close to relegation. Here's how it went wrong.

items.title: Norris fastest on first day of Bahrain test but Red Bull impress rivals
items.summary: Lando Norris topped the timesheet for McLaren, but it was the performance of Max Verstappen's Red Bull that impressed the paddock on the first day of Formula 1's pre-season test in Bahrain.

items.title: Doubts over hosts’ readiness set to force postponement of 2027 Africa Cup of Nations
items.summary: Kenya, Tanzania and Uganda unlikely to be ready in time Women’s edition fear of hosts’ Morocco withdrawal Next year’s Africa Cup of Nations could be postponed until 2028 owing to doubts over the readiness of Kenya, Tanzania and Uganda to host the tournament, in a move that would lead the Confederation of African Football to scrap one edition of its showpiece competition. The Guardian understands that Caf’s executive committee will discuss the proposal when it meets in Dar es Salaam on Friday, with Morocco’s expected withdrawal as hosts for next month’s Women’s Afcon also high on the agenda. Continue reading...

items.title: OH Leuven vs Arsenal LIVE!
Clubs to vote on expanding Championship play-offs
items.summary: EFL clubs will vote on expanding play-offs in the Championship from four to six teams at a meeting next month.
